channel.title: Online Tools on cmdragon's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Online Tools on cmdragon's Blog

item.title: M3U8 Online Player - Free Ad-Free HLS Livestream Player with Speed Control and Quality Switching
item.description: 🎬 Free professional M3U8/HLS online player, supports livestream and local video files! With playback speed control, multi-quality switching, fullscreen mode and more, ad-free, no installation required, use directly in browser!

item.title: Video Downloader - Download Popular Videos from the Entire Web with One Click, Save Locally in HD Lossless Quality
item.description: 🎬 Powerful online video download tool supporting multiple major video platforms! One-click link analysis, support for 1080P/4K HD quality, multi-format selection, batch download, makes collecting videos easier than ever!

item.title: Image to Particles Effect - Transform Any Image into Stunning Particle Animations
item.description: 🎨 Powerful particle effect generator that transforms images into dynamic particle animations! Supports customizable particle size, density, movement trajectories, export as video or interactive HTML, perfect for visual effects, presentations, and artistic creation!

item.title: Done in 10 Minutes! Detailed Steps to Connect AI Magic Resume to Free AI Services
item.description: This tutorial will guide you through configuring free AI services like OpenRouter in your AI Magic Resume.
